---
title: "Internal Teaching"
format: html
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(lubridate)

teaching <- yaml::read_yaml("data/teaching.yml")
```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

for (i in seq_along(teaching)) {
  
  row <- teaching[[i]]
  
  # ---- Dates ----
  date_vec <- as.Date(row$dates)
  date_vec <- sort(date_vec)
  
  first_year  <- format(min(date_vec), "%Y")
  most_recent <- format(max(date_vec), "%Y-%m-%d")
  n_sessions  <- length(date_vec)
  
  # ---- Optional slides ----
  slide_link <- if (!is.null(row$slides) && !is.na(row$slides)) {
    paste0("[Slides](", row$slides, ")")
  } else ""
  
  # ---- Optional link ----
  link_text <- if (!is.null(row$link) && !is.na(row$link)) {
    paste0(" | [Recording](", row$link, ")")
  } else ""
  
  cat(
    "### ", row$title, "\n\n",
    
    "*", row$venue, "*  \n",
    "**Audience:** ", row$target, "  \n\n",
    
    row$description, "  \n\n",
    
    "**First delivered:** ", first_year, "  \n",
    "**Most recent:** ", most_recent, "  \n",
    "**Total sessions:** ", n_sessions, "  \n\n",
    
    slide_link,
    link_text,
    
    "\n\n---\n\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```
